meta.title: Pricing — KiX
hero.title: Free SaaS. Pay only for results.
hero.sub: All gamification capabilities at no cost. Pay per acquired customer only when KiX delivers — no subscription, no setup fee, no contract lock-in.
free.label: Free forever
free.desc: No subscription. No card to start. Pay only when KiX delivers a verified new customer.
free.f1: 79 AI-generated game templates (kopi · bubble tea · nail · gym · 5 more verticals)
free.f3: SDKs for Web · iOS · Android shell
free.f4: No brand limits, no user caps
free.f6: Self-serve onboarding (15 min · founder direct help on WhatsApp)
